creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Neel Chauhan from comment #27)
> Also, how would I simulate the action which would cause the kernel panic without the patch?

Just use it as before for some time and report if your kernel panicing or not here.

This patch fixes panic caused by processing of unknown format PS\2 packets by kernel driver. As my hardware was not able to send such a packets, I had to simulate them. There is some probability that your unusual hardware sends some data in unexpected format so in this case the patch would fix the panic for you.
